title: 500 x Black Paper Drinking Straws Biodegradable Eco 8" (20cm) Approx (2x250) by Healthy Home
features: Eco-Friendly & Biodegradable – Made from premium paper, these black drinking straws are 100% biodegradable and compostable. A sustainable alternative to plastic straws – better for the planet and safe for the environment.
Generous Bulk Pack (500 Straws) – Comes in two handy boxes of 250 straws each, perfect for homes, parties, cafes, bars, restaurants, events, and catering use.
Sleek & Stylish Black Design – Add a touch of elegance to any drink. Ideal for cocktails, smoothies, juices, iced coffees, and more. Suitable for both hot and cold beverages.
8” / 20cm Length – Designed to fit most standard glasses and tumblers. Strong and durable enough to last through your entire drink without getting soggy quickly.
description: Sip sustainably with this pack of 500 black paper drinking straws, perfect for both hot and cold beverages. These biodegradable and eco-friendly straws are a stylish, environmentally conscious alternative to plastic, helping you reduce waste without compromising on quality. At 8 inches (20cm) in length, they’re ideal for cocktails, soft drinks, smoothies, and coffee, making them suitable for cafés, bars, restaurants, or parties. The sleek black design adds a touch of sophistication to any drink, while the durable paper material ensures they won't get soggy too quickly.
